title: How to add a condition to a Date Column Date Reminder automation
excerpt: Is it possible to add a condition to a built in Date Reminder automation?

posts.author: SimonKemp (Simon Kemp)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add a condition to a built in Date Reminder automation?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: The ‘template’ reminders are usually not able to be edited. However, you can recreate it with whatever condition you need.
